reviews.comment:
Típico de Dolores, parque, snacks, café, bebidas. Si viajas con animales es ideal porque tenes donde pasearlos

(Translated by Google)
Typical of Dolores: park, snacks, coffee, drinks. If you're traveling with pets, it's ideal because you have a place to walk them.

reviews.comment:
A mí me parece, qué es un lugar  para parar comprar algún snack, usar el sanitario y seguir. a la noche no encontrás nada para comer para mí gusto cierran muy temprano ...

(Translated by Google)
It seems to me like it's a place to stop, buy a snack, use the restroom, and move on. At night you won't find anything to eat; in my opinion, they close too early...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHcUtTWG1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una verguenza los precios saliendo de mar del plata en una misma.ypf nos cobraron un cafe promo con unnalfajor $150 menos

(Translated by Google)
The prices leaving Mar del Plata in the same YPF station are outrageous. They charged us $150 less for a promotional coffee with an alfajor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHeU9YRVF3EAE
